first live trade via longport MCP — process learning, not P&L optimized
no stop-loss set; exit driven by Eden signal invalidation or peer flip
exit_plan: 跟 Eden：若 NXPI setup 從 Long/Growing 變 Fading / Peaking / setup 消失 / semi trio 整體 flip conflicted → 平倉。無固定 stop-loss，依賴 Eden 狀態驅動。
